... / Kick the Alien

Kick the Alien

Kick the Alien is a wacky clicker game where an evil alien has just arrived to colonize your planet. And your job is to give a sneaky alien the pounding it deserves. Every click you make sends the alien flying, earns you coins, and pushes you closer to the next level. Use those coins to unlock wild weapons, new battlegrounds, and more.

Play Kick the Alien Online

Loading game...
About Kick the Alien

Kick the Alien is a wacky clicker game where an evil alien has just arrived to colonize your planet. And your job is to give a sneaky alien the pounding it deserves. Every click you make sends the alien flying, earns you coins, and pushes you closer to the next level. Use those coins to unlock wild weapons, new battlegrounds, and more. This browser game page adds original guidance and context so players can understand the challenge before the embedded game loads.

How to Play
  • Press play to load Kick the Alien in your browser.
  • Use the controls shown inside the game.
  • Keep practicing to improve your score and progress.
Game Features
Instant browser play Clicker game category Free online gameplay No download required
Frequently Asked Questions

Can I play Kick the Alien for free?

Yes. Kick the Alien is available as a free browser game on ArcadeNest.

Do I need to install Kick the Alien?

No installation is required. The game runs inside the browser iframe.
